root.sql:
select PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no ) as membername, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_date, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_date ) as withdraw_date_tdate , sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.entry_id, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.entry_date, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_doc_no, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_status ,
sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.money_type_id , sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.bank_id, (select bank_name from sc_acc_m_ucf_bank where bank_id = sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.bank_id) as bank_name, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.bank_account_no, pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.bank_account_no , 'XXX-X-XXXXXXXXXX' ) as from_bank_account_no,
sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det.period, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det.share_month, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det.share_stock, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det.share_withdraw, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det.seq_no,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date) AS resignation_approve_date_tdate
, coalesce( ( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) AND sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL' AND sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' AND sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no =sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no ) , 0 ) AS tnl_amount ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc -- ,('!withdraw_date_1!')::timestamp AS begin_date -- ,('!withdraw_date_2!')::timestamp AS end_date
from sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det, sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , -- sc_com_m_branch , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type where ( sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_doc_no = sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_det.withdraw_doc_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) -- and ( sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type ) and (sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_status = '0' ) --and sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.membership_no = '902704' -- and sc_mem_m_share_withdraw_head.withdraw_date = '17/01/2022' /*WHERE*/

r_amnat_share_withdraw_nest_aero.sql: SELECT sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no, sc_com_m_receipt_item.seq_no, sc_com_m_receipt_item.description, sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) )

r_amnat_share_withdraw_nest.sql:
SELECT tab_data.account_id, tab_data.account_name, tab_data.loan_type, tab_data.loan_type_description, tab_data.principal_amount, tab_data.interest_amount, tab_data.item_amount ,tab_data. loan_type_des from ( /* เงินกู้ */ SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date , sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id as money_type_id ,(sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_type) as loan_type_des FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_com_m_receipt.share_stock = sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount
GROUP BY sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ,sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_type
union
SELECT sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id as account_id , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name as account_name , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id as loan_type , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name as loan_type_description , sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date , sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id as money_type_id ,' - ' as loan_type_des FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type
WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item <> 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_com_m_receipt.share_stock = sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount
GROUP BY sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id
) tab_data , sc_fin_m_close_day ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type where sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = tab_data.receipt_date and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = tab_data.money_type_id and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date between '!withdraw_date_1!' and '!withdraw_date_2!' and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = 'TNL'
